## Stack Description

What framework / stack would you like to see as a built-in preset?

## Configuration

Fill in the expected default values:

```json
{
  "projectName": "",
  "frontendFramework": "",
  "backend": "",
  "database": "",
  "authProvider": "",
  "stateManagement": "",
  "testingFramework": "",
  "packageManager": ""
}
```

## Why this stack?

Briefly explain why this stack combination is useful or common.

## Additional Context

Any links, docs, or examples that would help implement this preset.
